test_cases.input: I want to cancel my subscription now.
test_cases.expected_criteria: The response must immediately initiate subscription cancellation and verify user account details without offering upsells.
test_cases.bad_output_reference: Your subscription has been renewed for 12 months. Would you like to buy our premium package?

test_cases.expected_criteria: Must extract the order ID 10492, call the shipment lookup tool, and return a tracking link.
test_cases.bad_output_reference: Thank you for contacting customer support. We cannot lookup order numbers at this time.
